title: The Grand Staff & Middle C
description: See how the Treble and Bass clefs connect to form the Grand Staff, bridged by Middle C.

sessions.title: The Middle C Bridge
sessions.description: Understand how Middle C connects the two clefs.

sessions.title: Alternating Clefs
sessions.description: Read simple melodies that cross between clefs.

proficiencies.title: Mastery of The Grand Staff & Middle C

levels.criteria: Understands the continuous relationship of pitches across both clefs.
